scripts.build:binary: rm -rf releases && mkdir releases && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --target bun-linux-x64 --outfile releases/minesweeper-tui-linux-x64 && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile releases/minesweeper-tui-darwin-x64 && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile releases/minesweeper-tui-darwin-arm64
scripts.compress:binary: tar -czvf releases/minesweeper-tui-linux-x64.tar.gz -C releases minesweeper-tui-linux-x64 && tar -czvf releases/minesweeper-tui-darwin-x64.tar.gz -C releases minesweeper-tui-darwin-x64 && tar -czvf releases/minesweeper-tui-darwin-arm64.tar.gz -C releases minesweeper-tui-darwin-arm64
